title: Hermetic verify + release hygiene (config overlay, E2E env seal, loud canary skip, no-repro closures)
action: (1) Machine-local config: .bee/config.json commits dogfood_repos[0].path=/home/thanhsmind/... (:39). Add gitignored overlay .bee/config.local.json: readConfig (state.mjs) deep-merges it over the tracked config (overlay wins; arrays replace); migrate dogfood_repos into the overlay on this machine; scrub the tracked config; add config.local.json to the onboarding gitignore block; bee config CLI: --local flag writes the overlay. (2) installers E2E env seal: test_installers_e2e.mjs assertVersionParity (:276-286) + the onboard recheck run execFileSync WITHOUT the sandbox env override — pass the same env the run() helper builds (:250-253) so no post-install call inherits real HOME/CODEX_HOME. (3) Loud canary skip: scripts/canary_codex.mjs no-binary path (:54-56) prints a single machine-greppable marker line (e.g. CANARY_SKIP reason=no-codex-binary) and run_verify's summary surfaces suites that self-reported skip (collect the marker from stdout; print a SKIPPED note beside PASS) — exit codes unchanged, runners stay green, silence gone. (4) No-repro closure: Node-24 timeout-worker instability — record the audit finding (no repo tie to Node 24; run-module-worker suites green across repeated runs) in docs/history/hardening-1-7-9/reports/hardening-8.md with the evidence; Windows installer E2E recorded there as deferred-needs-Windows-runner. Tests: readConfig overlay rows (overlay wins, absent overlay = today, arrays replace) in test_state.mjs; E2E env-seal assertion (post-install calls receive sandbox env — assert via the existing deny-sentinel canary machinery); canary marker row. RED first where applicable, then GREEN + full verify.

truths: Tracked .bee/config.json contains no machine-local absolute path; overlay merge proven by tests; this machine keeps its dogfood_repos via the overlay.
Every post-install verification call in the installers E2E runs under the sandbox env (deny-sentinel proves no real-HOME touch).
Canary no-binary skip emits the greppable marker and run_verify surfaces it as SKIPPED-not-silent; exit codes unchanged.
hardening-8 report records the Node-24 no-repro evidence and the Windows-E2E deferral; full run_verify.mjs green.
prohibitions: Do NOT gitignore the whole .bee/config.json (commands/hooks config stays tracked).
Do NOT make the canary fail when codex is absent.

trace.outcome: config.local.json overlay (dogfood_repos scrubbed from tracked config, overlay wins, arrays replace); installers E2E env-seal (assertVersionParity + doctor check now run under sandboxEnv); canary loud CANARY_SKIP marker + run_verify SKIPPED surfacing; Node-24/Windows-E2E no-repro closures recorded
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "red_failure_evidence": "BEFORE: .bee/config.json tracked this machine's absolute dogfood_repos path with no overlay mechanism (readConfig had no localConfigPath/mergeConfigOverlay export at all -- git-stashing state.mjs made test_state.mjs throw SyntaxError: does not provide an export named 'localConfigPath'). test_installers_e2e.mjs's assertVersionParity and the codex-plugin-first doctor check ran execFileSync/spawnSync with NO env option at all, silently inheriting the real outer-process HOME/CODEX_HOME/PATH -- proven by a static regression check that failed before env:sandboxEnv(sb) was added to all 3 call sites. canary_codex.mjs's no-binary skip printed only a plain human sentence with no machine-greppable marker -- test_run_verify_skip_marker.mjs's CANARY_SKIP assertions failed against the pre-fix script. Also found live: bee.mjs's FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS omitted 'local', so --local silently consumed the next CLI token (--json) as its own value instead of becoming boolean true, and the config write silently landed in the tracked file instead of the overlay with no error at all -- reproduced by removing 'local' from the set and re-running the new --local round-trip test, which failed on a JSON.parse error.",
  "green": [
    "node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash: 23/23 passed",
    "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_state.mjs: 31/31 passed (5 new overlay rows)",
    "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs: 221/221 passed (1 new --local round-trip row)",
    "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs: 93/93 passed (export allowlist updated)",
    "node scripts/test_run_verify_skip_marker.mjs: 7/7 passed (new suite)",
    "node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs: 0 failures, 1 pre-existing skip",
    "node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write then --check: 411 files match",
    "node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs: .claude-plugin/skills + .codex-plugin/skills re-rendered (120 files each)",
    "node scripts/run_verify.mjs run 3x FOREGROUND: 53/53 suites PASS, exit 0 every time"
  ],
  "no_repro_closures": {
    "node24_timeout_worker_instability": "No repo tie to Node 24 found; this session's live runtime is Node v24.14.1 (node --version). Every run-module-worker-based suite (test_split_brain_regression.mjs and others) ran green across 3 repeated full-verify passes plus standalone reruns during this cell -- no timeout reproduced.",
    "windows_installer_e2e": "Deferred -- needs a real Windows runner. test_installers_e2e.mjs proves only the Bash installer in this slice per its own header; unchanged by this cell."
  },
  "deviations": [
    "Did not wire scripts/canary_codex.mjs into run_verify.mjs's mandatory suite list: this dev machine has a real codex binary on PATH, so canary's default mode would attempt live codex exec calls inside the mandatory baseline-gate command -- exactly the cost/determinism risk canary.yml was split out to avoid. Implemented the general SKIP_MARKER_RE/skipNote surfacing mechanism in run_verify.mjs plus a dedicated test (test_run_verify_skip_marker.mjs) that exercises both the mechanism and the concrete canary_codex.mjs marker output directly, without changing commands.verify's cost profile.",
    "Found and fixed a pre-existing CLI parser bug while wiring --local: 'local' was missing from FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS, so --local silently consumed the next token as its value instead of becoming boolean true. Fixed plus regression-tested (test_bee_cli.mjs)."
  ]
}
trace.verify_output: 3 consecutive FOREGROUND runs: 53/53 suites PASS, exit 0 each time (no WSL2 flake reproduced for test_store_lock/test_render_race). Sub-suites individually verified RED-then-GREEN: test_installers_e2e.mjs (23/23), test_state.mjs (31/31, +5 overlay rows), test_bee_cli.mjs (221/221, +1 --local row), test_misc.mjs (93/93, export-allowlist fixed), test_run_verify_skip_marker.mjs (7/7, new), test_onboard_bee.mjs (0 fail/1 skip pre-existing). release_manifest --check/--selftest green.
